---
title: "Dual-Dataset Bias Mitigation in AI Hiring"
author: "Muhammad Ahmad"
output: ioslides_presentation
---

## Title
Bias Mitigation Pipeline in AI-Driven Hiring Processes

## Problem & Motivation
- Hiring AI can encode bias
- Need measurable mitigation with explainability

## Literature Highlights
- Fairness metrics and intervention foundations
- 2025 ethical AI hiring updates

## Methodology (DALC)
- Data prep
- EDA and bias detection
- Reweighting-based modeling
- Fairness evaluation
- XAI and deployment

## Dataset Overview (Side-by-Side)
- **Dataset 1**: Synthetic Loan/Hiring Data (`final_bias_hiring_dataset.csv`) — injected bias experiments
- **Dataset 2**: AI Hiring Bias Detection Kaggle (`data.csv`) — live performance validation

## EDA Findings
- Hiring rates by gender
- Score distributions by gender
- Correlation heatmaps per dataset

## Model Results — Dataset 1
- Baseline logistic vs mitigated models
- Accuracy, AUC, F1

## Model Results — Dataset 2
- Baseline logistic vs mitigated models
- Accuracy, AUC, F1

## Comparative Results Table
- Side-by-side model metrics across datasets

## Fairness Metrics Before/After
- Demographic parity
- Equalized odds
- Disparate impact ratio

## XAI Findings
- Feature importance
- Break-down explanations
- PDPs for key features

## Live Demo Overview
- Plumber API: `/health`, `/predict`, `/fairness_report`

## UAE Relevance
- Practical fairness governance for regional hiring contexts

## Limitations & Future Work
- Synthetic realism constraints
- Single protected attribute
- Multi-attribute fairness next

## Conclusion
Dual-dataset validation strengthens project credibility and applicability.

## References
Key references [1]–[12] from paper.

## Q&A
Thank you.
